reviews.comment:
La verdad que impecable la atención. Paramos a dormir y las habitaciones que alquilan están muy bien y a un precio muy razonable.

(Translated by Google)
The service was truly impeccable. We stopped for the night and the rooms they rent are very nice and very reasonably priced.

reviews.comment:

I have to separate the excellent t-shirt from the horrible cafeteria: stale cookies, poorly served, awful.

Please clean the bathrooms!!!

reviews.comment:
Una total falta de respeto a los miles de turistas que pasan a diario.
Una larguísima cola en el kiosco donde tenes que esperar porque Una sola persona atiende para todo y todos, hasta por la ficha de $300 para agua del mate, tenes que hacer la cola, cuando en otras estaciones de servicio el agua caliente es gratis.
Saca la cuenta, estuve 30 minutos en la cola y éramos 20personas con termos, a $300 la ficha.....

(Translated by Google)
A total lack of respect for the thousands of tourists who pass by every day.
A very long line at the kiosk where you have to wait because only one person serves everything and everyone, even for the $300 token for mate water, you have to wait in line, when at other gas stations hot water is free.
Do the math, I stood in line for 30 minutes and there were 20 of us with thermoses, at $300 a token...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREeUw2SUVBEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great, they just need to add some staff for long weekends

reviews.comment:
El bar: precios valor dolar. Baño: impresnetables: carga de combustible, parece ser la unica estación en km. Se aprovechan de esa situación.  (Menos 10) no cosnuman mas que lo necesario

(Translated by Google)
The bar: prices in dollars. Bathroom: unpresentable. Fueling up; it seems to be the only station for miles around. They take advantage of that. (Minus 10) Don't consume more than necessary.

reviews.comment:
Desastre total, y no lo digo siendo desconsiderada o por única experiencia, sino porque pasamos obligadamente por ahí unas 3-4 veces al año. Siempre desastre ! mala atención, Los baños inmundos, el Cafe re contra re mil caliente, las medialunas siempre siempre viejas, el agua para el mate fría, cagar combustible una eternidad
Lamentablemente en muchos kilómetros a la redonda no hay nada para parar y no queda otra !

(Translated by Google)
A total disaster, and I'm not saying this out of spite or based on a single experience, but because we have to pass through there 3-4 times a year. Always a disaster! Bad service, filthy bathrooms, the coffee is piping hot, the croissants are always stale, the water for mate is freezing cold, and it takes forever to get fuel. Unfortunately, there's nowhere to stop for miles around, and there's no other option!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEcm9ta0J3EAE
